others_translation_ai_disclaimer: Aufgrund der KI-Übersetzung kann es zu Fehlern kommen.
others_translation_gemini: GBBINFO-JPN stellt mit Ausnahme einiger Seiten Übersetzungen für jede Seite mithilfe von AI Gemini bereit.
others_translation_lang_note: Übersetzungssprachen werden je nach Zugriffssituation nach Bedarf hinzugefügt.
others_translation_pages_intro: Die Seiten, die Übersetzungen bereitstellen, sind die folgenden.
others_translation_title: Informationen zur Übersetzung der einzelnen Seiten
others_translation_untranslated_note: Seiten ohne Übersetzung werden im Originaljapanisch angezeigt.
participant_related_disclaimer: Angezeigte Seiten, SNS und Bio stammen aus automatischer Suche.
result_showcase_no_results: {SHOWCASE}-Kategorien haben keine Battles, daher gibt es keine Ergebnisse.
rule_2023_judges_showcase_actual: ⇒Tatsächlich traten nur einige Juroren mit einem {SHOWCASE} auf.
rule_2023_judges_showcase_video: ※Im Video wurde angekündigt, dass alle Juroren ein {SHOWCASE} geben würden.
rule_2023_penalty_over_11s: 11 Sekunden oder mehr über der Zeit: -1 Punkt pro Sekunde
rule_2023_penalty_under_10s: Bis zu 10 Sekunden über der Zeit: keine Strafe
rule_2023_u18_eligibility: Am Tag von {GBB} {year} muss man unter 18 Jahre alt sein
rule_after_aug1_detail: {Swissbeatbox} decides case by case, considering visa and travel arrangements.
rule_before_aug1_detail: In principle, withdrawal triggers replacement from lower {Wildcard} ranks.
rule_category_note: The data above reflects information at the time the rules were announced. Actual participant counts may change due to withdrawals, etc.
rule_comeback_intro: {ComebackWildcard} is a special slot where one {Beatboxer} who did not qualify through the regular {SoloWildcard} ranking receives a spot.
rule_dst_note: ※ Central European Time observes daylight saving time. In {year}, DST starts on March 30.
rule_dst_tag_team_crew_note: {TagTeam} category and {Crew} category entrants should take note.
rule_eligibility_gbb2019: Competed on the main stage at GBB 2019 or later
rule_eligibility_judge_ok: Eligible if judging duties are not affected
rule_eligibility_loop_top20: Top 20 in Loopstation at GBB 2019 or later
rule_eligibility_pro_performed: Performed that show within the past 12 months
rule_eligibility_pro_show: Can perform a professional live show
rule_eligibility_solo_top30: Top 30 in Solo at GBB 2019 or later
rule_intro: {Swissbeatbox} has announced the rules for each category and {Wildcard} at GBB {year}.
rule_judge_nomination_detail: Five judges each freely nominate one person from the eligible pool (up to five candidates).
rule_judge_nomination_note: If all five judges nominate the same {Beatboxer}, that person is confirmed immediately.
rule_judge_vote: Judge votes: each judge ranks the candidates.
rule_main_judges_link: GBB {year} main event judges list here
rule_member_vote: Member votes: {Swissbeatbox} {YouTube} members vote during the live stream, counted as a sixth judge vote.
rule_notices_p1: The information below is provided to help {Beatbox} fans enjoy GBB more.
rule_notices_p1_note: Some content prioritizes clarity over precision.
rule_notices_p1_strong: This may result in expressions that are not strictly accurate.
rule_notices_p2: We are not responsible for any damages arising from the content on this site.
rule_notices_p2_strong: please verify the official rules yourself.
rule_penalty_duration: Penalty applies at {m} min {s} sec or more
rule_penalty_overtime: Exceeding the time limit lowers final rank by 1 per second
rule_penalty_undertime: Finishing early also lowers final rank by 1 per unused second
rule_producer_description: A category with a second device (a device connected to the {Loopstation}) for {Loopstation}. Introduced at GBB23 as the "{Producer} showcase". As a trade-off, second devices are banned in the {Loopstation} category.
rule_referee_detail: Referees were introduced at GBB23 as members separate from judges. Judges evaluate performances; referees verify rule compliance.
rule_replacement_intro: If a GBB participant withdraws, replacement is made from lower {Wildcard} ranks.
rule_replacement_target_p1: In principle, only higher-ranked {Wildcard} finishers are eligible for replacement.
rule_replacement_target_p2: Challenger Series 2nd place and below are not eligible.
rule_runners_up: Runners-up: top {Wildcard} finishers who did not qualify for the main event
rule_runners_up_example: Example: with 8 {Wildcard} spots, ranks 9–16 are runners-up.
rule_second_league_p1: A new "Second League" has been established this year in China, inviting GBB {year} {Solo} runners-up.
rule_second_league_p2: Winning the Second League earns a spot in GBB {nextYear} {Solo}.
rule_second_league_policy: This site does not cover Second League information.
rule_second_league_replacement: Participation in the Second League is optional; regardless, if a GBB {year} {Solo} spot opens, replacement into GBB {year} {Solo} is possible.
rule_seeds_cs_example: Example: if the Challenger Series winner already qualified via {Wildcard}, replacement comes from lower {Wildcard} ranks, not 2nd place in the Challenger Series.
rule_seeds_cs_note: Under no circumstances is a spot given to anyone other than the Challenger Series winner.
rule_seeds_intro: There are three ways to earn a GBB spot:
rule_seeds_intro_alt: Ways to earn a GBB spot other than winning {Wildcard} (seed rights), and the eligible participants, are as follows.
rule_seeds_title: How to earn a GBB spot
rule_seeds_tournament_example: Example: if a seed tournament winner already qualified via {Wildcard}, replacement comes from lower {Wildcard} ranks, not 2nd place in the seed tournament.
rule_seeds_tournament_note: Under no circumstances is a spot given to anyone ranked 2nd or lower in a seed tournament.
rule_seeds_tournament_rule: The rules explicitly state that GBB spots from seed tournaments are given exclusively and always to the winner only.
rule_showcase_age_limit: Applicants must be 18 or older on the day of GBB {year}.
rule_showcase_cannot_apply: Those already qualified or under selection for GBB {year} cannot apply.
rule_showcase_eligibility_intro: Applicants must meet at least one of the following conditions.
rule_showcase_loop_recording: New recording: 5–10 min / Past footage (within 16 months): 3 min or more
rule_showcase_p1: Starting in 2026, "{SHOWCASE}" has been added as a new category.
rule_showcase_p1_battle: There are no battles in this category.
rule_showcase_p1_review: {Wildcard} entries are judged by different criteria such as story, artistry, and originality.
rule_showcase_p2: The number of participants in {SHOWCASE} {Solo} and {SHOWCASE} {Loopstation} is not disclosed and is decided at {Swissbeatbox}'s discretion.
rule_solo_final_p1: The GBB {year} {Solo} final tournament will be an 8-person bracket.
rule_solo_final_p2: Beatboxers have repeatedly requested an 8-person bracket since GBB 2021.
rule_special_crew: If withdrawal occurs after August 1 and replacement is impossible, the format may change from battle to {Showcase}.
rule_special_loop_1: If the GBB {prevYear} winner withdraws, only in {Loopstation}, 2nd and 3rd place from GBB {prevYear} are eligible.
rule_special_loop_2: If 3rd place withdraws, replacement from lower {Wildcard} ranks applies as in other categories.
rule_special_scoring: Five judges score each entry; the highest and lowest scores are dropped, and the average of the remaining three is used.
rule_special_solo_1: If a GBB {prevYear} top finisher withdraws, up to one replacement from lower {Wildcard} ranks is allowed; two or more withdrawals are not handled.
rule_special_solo_2: If the Challenger Series winner withdraws, up to three replacements from lower {Wildcard} ranks are allowed; four or more are not handled.
rule_special_solo_3: No replacement if the GBB {prevYear} {SevenToSmoke} winner withdraws.
rule_summer_announcement: Expected by summer at the latest
rule_thanks_chat: We prepared "GBB {year} Q&A Chat" to help explain the rules more clearly.
rule_thanks_p1: This year's rules changed significantly and may have been hard to follow.
rule_thanks_p2: I spent two hours writing this page. Seriously tired.
rule_thanks_title: To everyone who read this far
rule_winner_decision_detail: Points from all six rankings (five judges + {Swissbeatbox} {YouTube} membership) are totaled, and the highest scorer earns a GBB {year} spot.
stream_check_latest: Check the latest info for GBB {year}
timetable_2023_berywam_note: Berywam (in der japanischen Version steht Secret Guest um 19:32)
timetable_2023_crew_final_en_note: {Crew}-Finale (in der englischen Version steht "3rd Place Match")
timetable_2023_secret_guest_note: Secret Guest (in der japanischen Version steht Berywam um 19:02)
timetable_2024_7tosmoke_timing_note: Die 7toSmoke-Startzeit (Quelle: offizielle Venue-Website) und der ABEMA-Stream-Start (Quelle: ABEMA-Stream-Seite) weichen voneinander ab. Der Grund für die spätere Übertragung gegenüber dem Vorrundenstart ist unbekannt.
timetable_2025_7tosmoke_timing_note: The reason the {SevenToSmoke} start time and stream start time differ is unknown.
timetable_2025_day1_stream_note: The timetable lists a 19:30 end time, but the livestream apparently runs until 21:00. The reason is unknown. It is also unclear whether Day 1 will run until 21:00.
timetable_7tosmoke_main_announce: Bekanntgabe der Teilnehmer für das Hauptturnier
timetable_note_2023_en_source: Die angegebenen Zeiten folgen der englischen Version. Die japanische und englische Version widersprechen sich.
timetable_note_2023_tt: For GBB 2023, Japanese and English timetables were published 7 days before the event, but only the Japanese version was correct; the English version had many errors.
timetable_note_delay: Das letzte Mal fand das GBB in Warschau, Polen statt war 2021, und GBB 2021 hatte eine Verspätung von etwa 2 Stunden.
timetable_note_gbb21_delay: GBB 2021 was delayed by about 2 hours from the schedule.
timetable_note_gbb24_tt: For GBB 2024, the timetable was published about one month before the event, but it contained many errors.
timetable_note_past: Hinweis: GBB 2022 wurde abgesagt, und GBB 2023–2025 fanden in Tokio statt.
timetable_showcase_performers_unknown: Die Auftrittszeiten der einzelnen Darsteller sind unbekannt.
top7tosmoke_info_delay: {SevenToSmoke} tends to release updates much later than the main GBB event, and there have been cases where the event started without any information being announced at all.
wildcard_2023_jst_note: Die Fristen der einzelnen Kategorien sind in Japan Standard Time angegeben.
wildcard_list_cet_note: Deadlines for each category are shown in Central European Time.
wildcard_list_manual_warning: Because this list was made entirely by hand, duplicates or omissions are possible.
wildcard_list_unofficial_intro: The {Wildcard} list published here was created by volunteers and is unofficial.
wildcard_list_video_warning: Videos in these playlists are not necessarily the ones submitted as {Wildcard}s (every year, someone is disqualified due to paperwork mistakes).
wildcard_reg_age_min: Age limit: must be 16 or older on the day of the main event
wildcard_reg_disqualify_1: Submit via the application form on the {Swissbeatbox} official site
wildcard_reg_disqualify_2: Keep backups of every file used to create your {Wildcard} video so you can submit them at any time
wildcard_reg_disqualify_3: You may submit a {Wildcard} only once. After submitting, you cannot submit a different {Wildcard} later
wildcard_reg_intro: This page explains important rules for submitting a {Wildcard}.
wildcard_reg_loop_device_2: Additional cables inside the unit are allowed; cables are not considered devices
wildcard_reg_minor_cost: The organizer does not cover costs for a guardian to accompany a minor (visa, flights, hotel, meals, etc.)
wildcard_reg_minor_disqualify: If these requirements are not met or agreed to, the entrant is disqualified and replacement comes from lower {Wildcard} ranks
wildcard_reg_minor_guardian: A guardian must accompany the minor
wildcard_reg_notices_p1: The content below is information for Beatboxers creating a {Wildcard}.
wildcard_reg_notices_p1_note: The site admin is not a Beatboxer and has no connection to GBB operations.
wildcard_reg_producer_device_1: Performing with a {Loopstation} alone is not allowed
wildcard_reg_producer_device_2: You must apply in advance with your device setup to SUPPORT@swissbeatbox.com
wildcard_reg_producer_device_3: Voice sources and voice triggers only
wildcard_reg_producer_device_5: Output to FOH (mixing desk) or recording must be stereo; multichannel output is not allowed
wildcard_reg_recording_1: You must be clearly visible on camera (do not cover your face or mouth with a mask or visual effects)
wildcard_reg_recording_2: Lip-sync and other video tricks are not allowed
wildcard_reg_recording_3: Filming and recording must be done at the same time
wildcard_reg_recording_4: Basic dynamics (compression), EQ plugins, and reverb are allowed, but recording must be raw and edited afterward
wildcard_reg_recording_5: Automatic processing such as different EQ or compression on kick and snare is not allowed
wildcard_reg_recording_6: Process the entire recording the same way
wildcard_reg_recording_7: Distortion, delay, other dynamic processing, and frequency distortion effects are not allowed
wildcard_reg_recording_fraud: If fraud is suspected under the above rules, you may be asked to submit additional files used to create your {Wildcard}
wildcard_reg_submit_both_required: If both of the above are not completed, you are disqualified
wildcard_reg_submit_delete: If you mistakenly delete a {Wildcard} after submitting it once, you are disqualified
wildcard_reg_submit_delete_note: This rule was introduced after trouble at GBB 2019
wildcard_reg_submit_form_warning: Every year, people are disqualified for forgetting to fill out the application form!!!
wildcard_reg_submit_once: You may submit a {Wildcard} only once. After submitting, you cannot submit a different {Wildcard} later
wildcard_reg_submit_raw_audio: Raw audio and raw video (including camera audio) must be submitted
wildcard_reg_submit_raw_required: If the above two are missing, you are disqualified
wildcard_reg_submit_screen_capture: For all categories except {Solo}, a screen capture during recording must also be submitted
wildcard_reg_submit_sns: Please take a screenshot here and share it on social media so your favorite beatboxer is not disqualified...
wildcard_reg_submit_step_2: Submit via the application form on the {Swissbeatbox} official site
wildcard_reg_video_intro: At the start of the video, introduce yourself as follows
wildcard_reg_video_script_note: In the original rules, this requirement is stated in very strong language.
wildcard_reg_video_script_note_2: There have also been cases in the past where violations of this rule led to disqualification.
wildcard_unofficial_notice: ※ Dies ist eine inoffizielle Liste. Duplikate oder Auslassungen sind möglich.
rule_closed_site_note: Stand Januar 2025 ist die offizielle GBB-Website geschlossen; Regeldetails sind unbekannt.
rule_intro_closed_site: Regeln für Kategorien und {Wildcard} bei GBB {year} wurden auf der offiziellen GBB-Website (grandbeatboxbattle.ch, jetzt geschlossen) veröffentlicht.
rule_2017_tag_team_note: Bei Tag Team gab es keine Wildcard-Plätze; nur eingeladene Teams traten an.
rule_2019_sbx_judges_note: Heute schwer vorstellbar, aber bis 2020 wirkten einige SBX-Mitglieder als Jurys.
rule_2020_intro: Die Regeln für GBB {year} Online wurden auf der offiziellen GBB-Facebook-Seite veröffentlicht.
rule_2020_background: GBB 2020 war ursprünglich für 3.–5. April 2020 in Warschau geplant, wurde aber wegen COVID-19 abgesagt. Stattdessen fand ein Online-Ersatzevent in Solo und Loopstation statt; Sieger erhielten einen Startplatz bei GBB 2021.
rule_2020_solo_invitees: GBB 2020 Wildcard Top 30 + D-LOW-Event-Teilnehmer + Discord-Community-Event Top 20
rule2021_2020_judges_note: Heute undenkbar, aber bis 2020 waren einige SBX-Mitglieder als Judges tätig.
rule2021_categories_intro: Die bei GBB 2021 ausgetragenen Kategorien und die wichtigsten Wege zur Teilnahme sind wie folgt.
rule2021_category_note1: *{TagTeamLoopstation} und {Crew} debütierten bei GBB 2020 (praktisch bei GBB 2021, da GBB 2020 abgesagt wurde), daher gibt es keine gesetzten Plätze.
rule2021_category_note2: *Die obigen Zahlen fassen die Plätze des abgesagten GBB 2020 und die zusätzlichen Plätze von 2021 zusammen. {TagTeamLoopstation} hatte keine zusätzlichen Plätze für 2021.
rule2021_notes_p1: GBB 2021 wurde als Verschiebung des abgesagten GBB 2020 ausgetragen. Daher erhielten alle, die einen Platz für GBB 2020 hatten, einen Platz für GBB 2021.
rule2021_notes_p2: Zusätzlich wurden für 2021 weitere Plätze eingerichtet.
rule2021_notes_p3: Es gab viele ungewöhnliche Maßnahmen, etwa dass sogar Personen, die GBB 2020 einmal abgesagt hatten, ausnahmsweise einen Platz erhielten.
rule2021_route_2020online: Setzplatz durch Sieg bei GBB 2020 Online
rule2021_seed_forfeit: Wenn eine gesetzte Person absagt, entfällt der Setzplatz in der Regel und es rückt eine niedriger platzierte {Wildcard}-Person nach.
top_site_description: Inoffizielle Seite, die Grand Beatbox Battle-Informationen ins Japanische übersetzt und übersichtlich zusammenstellt.
top_2013_2016_participants_only: Für 2013–2016 stellt diese Website grundsätzlich nur Teilnehmerinformationen bereit.
top2021_tagline: Eine inoffizielle Website, die verschiedene Informationen zur Grand Beatbox Battle übersetzt und übersichtlich zusammenfasst.
top2022_message: GBB 2022 wurde abgesagt. {Swissbeatbox} nannte als Grund eine "interne Umstrukturierung".
ticket_2020_online: GBB {year} fand online statt und wurde live auf dem offiziellen Swissbeatbox-YouTube-Kanal übertragen.
timetable2021_anecdote_p1: Wie sich der Seitenbetreiber, der GBB 2021 vor Ort verfolgte, erinnert: Nach der letzten SHOWCASE und der Siegerehrung an Day 3 war beim Verlassen der Halle ein schöner Sonnenaufgang zu sehen. Gleichzeitig wurde mir schwindelig, wie ich mich erinnere.
timetable2021_anecdote_p2: Zurück im Hotel zeigte die Uhr 5 Uhr morgens Warschauer Zeit.
timetable2021_delay_detail: Außerdem begannen fast alle Programmpunkte etwa zwei Stunden später als ursprünglich angekündigt.
timetable2021_intro: Während GBB 2021 wurden mit Hilfe von Freiwilligen die tatsächlichen Zeitstempel aufgezeichnet.
timetable2021_no_7tosmoke: Für das 7toSmoke gibt es jedoch keine Zeitstempel-Aufzeichnung.
timetable_solo_all_finals: {Solo} Viertelfinale, Halbfinale, Spiel um Platz 3 & Finale
